description: Add deterministic E2E scenarios for one API-first source and one browser-required source from runnable Acquisition Source through retrieval, normalized extraction, Bid persistence, Finding projection, document/provenance state, and operator queue visibility. Acceptance: SAM plus a provider adapter path pass offline fixtures, and canonical auth, throttling, selector/schema, and zero-result failures land in the correct durable health states.
title: Prove procurement retrieval end to end
